rows.label: tev021401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev021401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Tika about Dolls.

rows.label: tev021401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Tika if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev021401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Tika about schematics.

rows.label: tev021401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Tika about Dolls.

rows.label: tev021401_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Tika about the Prog Ares.

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0001
rows.name:
When the White Whale was attacked, it was the Doll team
of the Special Operations Heavy Armor Training Unit
that overcame the xenoforms' military superiority.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Colonel Elma and Iriina fought like their very
souls had entered their Dolls and were controlling
them directly. It was an awe-inspiring sight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0003
rows.name:
They shot down one enemy after
another until they eventually
chased them off entirely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0004
rows.name:
That was when I became aware of
the infinite amount of untapped
potential that Dolls possess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0005
rows.name:
We mechanics do our part to make the machines—
all we ask in return is that the BLADEs who
pilot them exploit that untapped potential.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0006
rows.name:
If you do, then I can't imagine
any obstacle we humans won't
be able to overcome.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0009
rows.name:
We're currently seeking a sparring
partner for our test pilot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0010
rows.name:
But our pilot is a little
bit...quirky, so we've had
problems filling the position.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0011
rows.name:
As things stand, we aren't able to obtain
any test data, which means our new weapon
cannot be put to use in the actual field.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0012
rows.name:
We need to find a BLADE operative
who's skilled enough to face off
against a Doll, and find them fast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0045
rows.name:
If you find a schematic for a piece of
equipment, it won't be for any old thing
that you can just buy at a shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0046
rows.name:
Schematics allow an arms manufacturer to assemble
special "nonstandard" weapons and armor that
aren't available on the open market yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0047
rows.name:
If you find one, you should take it
straight to the AM terminal in Armory
Alley to see what sort of gear it's for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0048
rows.name:
Of course, you'll have to provide the materials
before it can be made for you, but it'll
almost certainly be something useful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0054
rows.name:
When we fought off the xenoforms that attacked
the White Whale, a Doll that I'd never seen
before played a major role in our victory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0055
rows.name:
I've always wondered what that Doll
was, so I've started looking into it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0056
rows.name:
Unfortunately, it's highly classified—all I was
able to learn is that it's called the Ares, and
it's currently being kept in the restricted hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0057
rows.name:
I wonder what sort of special power it possesses?
It must be something really incredible if
they're keeping such a tight lid on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0058
rows.name:
The Doll that Lao took with him was
a new model known as the Prog Ares.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0059
rows.name:
Apparently its design was based
on the original Ares, that
top-secret Doll of unknown origin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0060
rows.name:
They say it's an incredible machine
with a level of power that even
makes it a match for Team Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0061
rows.name:
Which begs the question—why has it
been parked in a hangar all this time
instead of being out in the field?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0062
rows.name:
I'm sure there has to be some logical
reason. But as a mechanic, I'm just
dying to get my hands on that thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Tika if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0013
rows.name:
I've really started to question
myself ever since that prototype
of mine performed so poorly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'm so obsessed with improving functionality
that I have a bad habit of neglecting to
consider the costs of production.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0015
rows.name:
I fall in love with schematics like
they're my children, and gradually
make them stronger and stronger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0016
rows.name:
But if that ends up causing them to be
mothballed, it defeats the whole purpose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0017
rows.name:
I make fun of Axena for being
so in love with Dolls, but it
turns out that I'm no better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0018
rows.name:
You make it sound like loving
Dolls is such a bad thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0019
rows.name:
But regardless, I like the weapons
that you make. I hope you'll make
another prototype I can test soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thanks. Next time, I'll make
sure it's something good enough
to use in actual combat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Tika about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I heard all the details about what happened. So
it was just a big misunderstanding after all.
And this time it wasn't a man, but a woman.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0022
rows.name:
But I guess Axena is always like that.
Once she gets involved with a Doll, she
loses sight of everything else around her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0023
rows.name:
I can't even count the number of
male mechanics and pilots that made
the same mistake. Poor bastards...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0024
rows.name:
But no matter how often I warn her about
that sort of thing, she never seems to
understand what I am talking about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0025
rows.name:
I guess that's a sign the Doll
obsession's gone a little too far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0027
rows.name:
But what am I supposed to do? You know
I don't care about things like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0028
rows.name:
All I need in my life is Dolls!
I'd marry one if I could![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0029
rows.name:
Yes, I know. And I don't blame you for that. I
just wish we could head off these tragedies
before another poor fool goes over that cliff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Tika about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0030
rows.name:
That was great work, how you
recovered the data from Camber's
fight with the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0031
rows.name:
I can't even tell you how valuable
it is to have data on how our
new weapon fares in battle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0032
rows.name:
Of course, the data makes it clear that our
current design isn't enough to stop the Growth,
but even that is incredibly valuable to know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0033
rows.name:
Now I'm going to use a revised plan
that incorporates new xenoform
technology to make it even better![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0034
rows.name:
I'm going to work so hard on this thing, it'll
even put Little Miss Doll Nut to shame. It is
gonna blow the Growth away...literally![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0036
rows.name:
Good luck, Tika! I can't wait to
try it out once you're finished![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0037
rows.name:
Sure! But this time it won't be a prototype—I'll
make sure it goes into production so you'll
actually be able to buy one for yourself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Wait, what? You're not going to give
me a comp? You are so cheap, Tika![ST:wait ]
